\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3611 introduces Zero Point Potential Delineates Energy Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. \paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$] The Zero Point Potential delineates the energy landscape of the vacuum within the Trawinized manifold. It is a highly structured, non‑convex potential field given by \[ V(\phi) = \frac{\lambda}{4}(\phi^2 - v^2)^2 + V_{\text{lemniscate}}(r,\theta) + \sum_{n=1}^{153{,}600} \delta\bigl(r - r_n\bigr)\,\Phi_{\text{nodal}}, \] where the Landau–Ginzburg term $
\]
